body: PolicyEngine-UK 2.88.56 parameter snapshot for SDLT parameters. For 2026-01-01, PolicyEngine-UK parameter gov.hmrc.stamp_duty.residential.purchase.additional.rate sets additional residential purchase SDLT rates as 3%, 5%, 8%, 13%, and 15% at thresholds 0, 125,000, 250,000, 925,000, and 1,500,000. For 2026-01-01, PolicyEngine-UK parameter gov.hmrc.stamp_duty.non_residential.rent sets non-residential lease rent SDLT rates as 0%, 1%, and 2% at thresholds 0, 150,000, and five million. This snapshot is generated from the installed policyengine-uk==2.88.56 package to ground PE-parity encodings where the validator needs normalized numeric source text. Generated additional residential purchase rates: [(0.0, 0.03), (125000.0, 0.05), (250000.0, 0.08), (925000.0, 0.13), (1500000.0, 0.15)]. Generated non-residential rent rates: [(0.0, 0.0), (150000.0, 0.01), (5000000.0, 0.02)].
heading: SDLT parameters in PolicyEngine-UK 2.88.56
